title: BM GROUP POLYTEC S.p.A. ransomware incident

extortion.description: BM GROUP POLYTEC S.p.A. Polytec is the merger of two leading companies in automation, robotics , renewable energy and plant engineering, an internationally renowned company operating in the field of system integration, specializing in solutions and platforms that combine robotics, artificial intelligence, process automation and software to help manufacturing companies achieve the technological transformation they need to become smart factories.    More
